$comment: c155 D-LK10-CRT-INIT-INVOKE closure witness #1: printf("%f") — the anchor's cited FP-formatting case — works on EVERY runnable leg with the trampoline calling main directly (no user-side CRT-init sequence), because each format's loader runs libc's own initialization first (pe: msvcrt DllMain at attach; elf: ld.so runs libc.so.6's initializers; macho: dyld runs libSystem's initializers before LC_MAIN). Also the first corpus pin of a variadic DOUBLE on every ABI (SysV xmm0+al, ms_x64 GPR slot image, AAPCS64 v0, Apple always-stack). Exact stdout asserted byte-for-byte: default %f precision is 6 (C17 7.21.6.1); msvcrt text mode makes it CRLF.
